item.title: Why Missile Alerts and War Updates Trigger Doomscrolling
item.description: A combination of war alerts, breaking news updates, and algorithmic feeds are trapping users in a threat-monitoring loop.

item.title: How Journalists Are Reporting From Iran With No Internet
